narrative:
Twinsburg Twp B (precinct in Summit County) has 907 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
